summary: Phase 5 Clinical (Follow-up / Daily Visit Notes) verified. Backend pytest /app/backend/tests/test_clinical_phase5.py: 12/12 PASSED against the public external URL https://demo-cleanup.preview.emergentagent.com/api in 10.6s — covers create-from-encounter happy path, one-note-per-encounter idempotency (200 + X-Note-Existed header), cancelled encounter rejects note create (409), PATCH structured S/O/A/P round-trip + vitals + regions + treatments, completeness scorer REQUIRED_FIELDS + missing_fields, sign lifecycle (draft→sign_ready→signed) with visit_number auto-increment within episode scope, copy-forward non-destructive default + force overwrite, copy-forward rejects unsigned source (400) + cross-note self (400), copy-forward inline during create, narrative SOAP (SUBJECTIVE/OBJECTIVE/ASSESSMENT/PLAN) headers + content, care-timeline merges encounters+initial_exams+follow_up_notes sorted date-desc, tenant isolation (cross-tenant 404 on GET/PATCH/sign), reauth required on writes (401 without). Prior phase regression pytest Phase1+Phase2+Phase4: 35/35 green. Frontend E2E against public URL (group-admin@sunrise.ccms.app): Clinical tab renders stat-notes tile + clinical-notes-card + care-timeline-card + stat-exams side-by-side; EncountersCard emits encounter-start-note-{id} on follow_up encounter; clicking it triggers the reauth modal (Confirm it's you), on confirm POST /api/patients/{pid}/clinical/notes creates the note and routes to /patients/{pid}/clinical/follow-up/{nid}; FollowUpNoteEditor loads with all 4 SOAP sections (note-section-subjective/objective/assessment/plan), header DRAFT badge, Copy-forward / Save draft / Mark sign-ready / Sign / View narrative action bar, completeness meter 'note-completeness-score' shows '0/5' + missing-field chips (interval history / pain scale / response to care / treatment rendered / next visit plan) before data entry. All 27 phase-5 testids probed on the live editor resolved: follow-up-note-editor, note-status-badge, note-visit-number, note-completeness, note-completeness-score, note-section-*, note-interval-history (textarea), note-pain-scale (number), note-pain-change/adherence/response-to-care (Radix Selects), note-functional-change/reassessment/clinical-impression/home-care/next-visit-plan (textareas), note-vitals-bp, note-vitals-pulse, note-interval-days, note-region-add, note-treatment-add, note-regions-treated, note-save-btn, note-copy-forward-btn, note-mark-ready-btn, note-narrative-btn, note-sign-btn.
verified_flows: POST /api/patients/{pid}/clinical/notes with encounter_id → 201; fields auto-fill from encounter (appointment_id, provider_id, patient_id), status=draft
Duplicate POST same encounter → 200 + X-Note-Existed:true + same id
PATCH merges subjective/objective/assessment/plan; RegionFinding + TreatmentEntry round-trip
draft→sign_ready (mark-ready); sign_ready→draft (unmark); sign → visit_number assigned monotonically within episode; signed blocks PATCH (409)
copy-forward non-destructive (preserves set fields, fills empty); force=true overwrites; source must be signed else 400; source patient mismatch 400; inline copy-forward at create OK
GET /api/patients/{pid}/clinical/care-timeline merges encounters + initial_exams + follow_up_notes sorted date-desc
Narrative returns SUBJECTIVE (S)/OBJECTIVE (O)/ASSESSMENT (A)/PLAN (P) headers with structured content
Reauth required: writes return 401 without x-reauth-token
Frontend: Clinical tab renders stat-notes + stat-exams + clinical-notes-card + care-timeline-card
Frontend: EncountersCard on follow_up encounter shows 'encounter-start-note-{enc.id}' (and still shows 'encounter-start-exam-{enc.id}' for new_patient_exam/re_evaluation — no regression)
Frontend: Clicking encounter-start-note opens reauth modal; on Confirm navigates to /patients/{pid}/clinical/follow-up/{nid}
Frontend: FollowUpNoteEditor renders all 4 SOAP sections from the backend payload; header status badge + completeness meter + missing-field chips populated
Frontend: note-completeness-score shows '0/5' on fresh note with REQUIRED_FIELDS pending
action_items: TEST-AUTHORING NOTE (not a product bug): note-adherence, note-pain-change, and note-response-to-care are Radix Select triggers (role=combobox), not inputs/textareas. Any future Playwright test must use click-trigger + click role=option pattern, not page.fill. The editor UX is correct — adherence/response-to-care/pain-change are enum fields and rendering a <Select> is appropriate. Optional: main agent could add a *-input sub-testid on the underlying button to disambiguate in test tooling, but not required.
critical_code_review_comments: services/clinical/notes_router.py — clean lifecycle (create/patch/mark-ready/unmark/sign/copy-forward/narrative/care-timeline); X-Note-Existed idempotency header correctly set; sign endpoint auto-increments visit_number scoped to episode; copy-forward correctly refuses unsigned source (400) and cross-patient (400); tenant isolation returns 404 (not 403) on cross-tenant — correct privacy posture.

services/clinical/notes_models.py — REQUIRED_FIELDS drives completeness scoring; SOAP Pydantic models (NoteSubjective/Objective/Assessment/Plan) + RegionFinding/TreatmentEntry structured widgets round-trip via PATCH without data loss.
backend/server.py — clinical_notes_patient_router + clinical_notes_appt_router + care-timeline router all wired; care-timeline merges encounters + initial_exams + follow_up_notes sorted date-desc.
backend/core/db.py lines 320-335 — indexes on clinical_follow_up_notes keyed by patient_id+status+updated_at; good for list pagination and summary counts.

frontend/pages/clinical/FollowUpNoteEditor.jsx — 58 data-testid attributes; all 27 phase-5 testids from the contract present; SOAP four-section layout; completeness meter + missing-field chips; Save/Mark-ready/Unmark/Sign/Copy-forward/Narrative toolbar; save button disabled when clean; sign disabled while dirty — matches phase-4 editor UX parity.
frontend/pages/clinical/ClinicalTab.jsx — stat-notes tile bound to summary.notes.open; FollowUpNotesCard + CareTimelineCard mounted; placeholder-follow-notes + placeholder-timeline removed.

frontend/pages/clinical/EncountersCard.jsx — encounter-start-note-{id} emitted only for follow_up/treatment_visit encounter_type (no regression for new_patient_exam/re_evaluation which keep encounter-start-exam-{id}).

frontend/pages/clinical/CareTimelineCard.jsx — timeline-entry-{kind}-{id} + timeline-open-{kind}-{id} deep-link tokens; will render encounter/initial_exam/follow_up_note entries as backend emits them.
updated_files: /app/tests/seed_phase5_e2e.py (new — Sunrise-tenant E2E seeder: patient + appointment + in-progress follow_up encounter)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on routing + testid coverage + reauth gate + editor render; structured field entry flow not fully exercised via Playwright due to Radix Select combobox pattern (product correct, test-author pattern change only)

test_credentials: group-admin@sunrise.ccms.app / Sunrise@ComplianceClinic1 (primary); admin@ccms.app / Admin@ComplianceClinic1 (Default-tenant cross-tenant probe)
seed_data_creation: Sunrise tenant: 1 patient (Phase5E2E) + 1 future appointment + 1 in_progress follow_up encounter (id 3b457162-ad47-4e93-ae1d-67f4e9dc8b8d under patient 63024100-7159-4016-b744-ea13b7d44419) + 1 draft follow-up note (id 00d3dd33-30bf-4885-b9d6-ac05b0f93818). Pytest suite seeds its own per-test patients/appts/encounters/notes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 is GA-worthy. Pattern: login group-admin@sunrise → /patients/{pid}?tab=clinical → click encounter-start-note-{enc.id} → reauth modal (ALWAYS appears on writes — fill password + Confirm) → editor at /patients/{pid}/clinical/follow-up/{nid}. IMPORTANT: note-adherence, note-pain-change, note-response-to-care are Radix Select triggers (role=combobox) — use click + role=option, NOT page.fill. Textareas are: interval-history/functional-change/reassessment/clinical-impression/home-care/next-visit-plan. Number inputs: pain-scale, interval-days, vitals-pulse. Text input: vitals-bp. Save requires dirty state; Sign button disabled while dirty (Save first). REQUIRED_FIELDS for 5/5 completeness: interval_history, pain_scale, response_to_care, at least one treatment_rendered entry, next_visit_plan. For copy-forward E2E need TWO signed notes on the same patient under the same episode. If backend returns 502, the container is missing libmagic1 — `sudo apt-get install -y libmagic1 && sudo supervisorctl restart backend` (pre-existing infra issue from iter34).
rca of the issue: No product bugs. The only friction point for automated UI tests is that 3 enum note fields (adherence / pain_change / response-to-care) render as Radix <Select> triggers (role=combobox), which is the correct UX for enum fields but requires combobox-pattern interaction in Playwright, not page.fill. This is a testing pattern note only — no code change required.
